_purpose: Scope-parameterized intake question catalog. Read by references/intake-mode-protocol.md when generating Q4-Q9 variants. Match a variant by scope dimensions (provinces, banner_kind, role_family), substitute template variables, present to user for one-at-a-time approval. Adding a new variant = appending a JSON entry, no prose edit needed.

_template_variables.{{provinces}}: Comma-joined human-readable province list, e.g., 'QC and ON' / 'all 10 provinces' / 'BC'
_template_variables.{{banner}}: Banner descriptor from user, e.g., 'Acme-banner stores' / 'a single banner' / 'all banners'
_template_variables.{{role_family}}: Role family if scoped, e.g., 'meat departments' / 'pharmacy' / null (omits role-family clause)
_template_variables.{{role_family_examples}}: Concrete role examples for the named role family, drawn from per-question examples_by_role_family
_template_variables.{{competitor_list}}: Comma-joined per-province competitor list, drawn from peer_companies_by_province
_template_variables.{{cycle_name}}: From engagement config cycle.cycle_name, e.g., 'FY26 Annual Wage Review'

peer_companies_by_province._doc: Used to substitute {{competitor_list}} in Q8 variants. Override via engagement-config.benchmark.peer_companies if user provides their own peer set.

examples_by_role_family._doc: Used to substitute {{role_family_examples}} in role-family-scoped variants. Add new role families as they appear in engagements.

variants.label: Q4 — Worry roles
variants.prompt_template:
Which two or three roles in your {{provinces_clause}}{{banner_clause}}{{role_family_clause}} are you most worried about losing right now? Name the role and the reason.

Examples of reasons: pay below market, manager issues, schedule, career path, location-specific.
Be specific (e.g., {{role_family_examples_or_default}}).

role_family_examples_or_default.unscoped: 'meat cutters in Montréal stores' rather than 'meat department'

variants.label: Q5 — Recruiting pain
variants.prompt_template:
Where is recruiting hardest right now? Which roles, which geographies, what's the typical time-to-fill?

If you have specific vacancy durations or unfilled-headcount data, include it. {{multi_province_granularity}}

multi_province_granularity.multi_province: Distinguish by province where the pattern differs.
multi_province_granularity.all_provinces: Distinguish by region (Atlantic, QC, ON, Prairies, BC) where the pattern differs.

variants.label: Q6 — Soft intel
variants.prompt_template:
What's the back-channel telling you? Things you're hearing from store managers, district managers, HRBPs that won't show up in HRIS reports.

Examples: groups thinking of unionizing, manager-level frustration with comp, retention story brewing in {{role_family_or_a_specific_segment}}, etc.

variants.label: Q8 — Competitor moves
variants.prompt_template: {{validation_grounding}}What have you heard about {{competitor_list}} doing on pay in {{provinces}} in the last six months? Posted rate changes, sign-on bonuses, retention programs, anything material.

validation_grounding._doc: Optional grounding line prepended when intake-mode-protocol's competitor wage validation pass returns a verified move. Format: '(Per <competitor> careers page accessed YYYY-MM-DD: <verified change>.) '

variants.label: Q9 — Poaching
variants.prompt_template: Is any competitor actively poaching from {{poaching_target_clause}} — which competitor, in which roles, what are they offering?
